productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Classic Black  Handbag
description: Update your style quotient with ease by adding this stylish bag from lino perros. Roomy and comfortable to carry, the smooth silhouette of this bag blends well with any outfit. Height: 19 cmWidth: 33 cmDepth: 14 cm Made of Leatherette for durability Has one main zippered compartment Two inner zippered compartments with organiser sleeves for a mobile and essentials Two short handles for carrying ease One zippered compartment at the back for additional space Bridged pattern in front with metallic embelishment of brand name Metallic embelishments nd stud detailing on the lower portion of the bag Care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
